messages.subject: TalentBridge — placement fee confirmation for upcoming searches
messages.body:
Hi Nina,

Great working with Vectrix on the Sr. Frontend search. As we ramp up the candidate pipeline, I want to confirm the fee arrangement: our standard rate is 18% of first-year base salary, per our original agreement.

For the Sr. Frontend role (band $145K–$165K), that puts the placement fee at approximately $26,100–$29,700 depending on final offer.

Let me know if you'd like to discuss before we proceed.

— Amanda Reyes
Senior Recruiter, TalentBridge

messages.subject: Re: TalentBridge — placement fee confirmation
messages.body:
Hi Amanda,

Thank you. We want to continue working with TalentBridge, but 18% is difficult at our current stage. We'd like to discuss a reduced rate.

Our ask: 15% for the current Sr. Frontend placement, with the understanding that we'll be making at least one more hire (Customer Success Manager) in Q1 if the Meridian deal closes. Volume consideration.

We're a seed-stage company and every placement fee is meaningful. Would 15% work for this placement?

— Nina

messages.subject: Re: TalentBridge — placement fee confirmation
messages.body:
Hi Nina,

I appreciate the context. I can't go to 15% on a single placement — our floor for single-role searches is 17%.

However, if you can confirm the CSM role in writing as a second placement, I can offer 16% across both. That would bring the Sr. Frontend fee to approximately $23,200–$26,400 at the current band.

If the CSM role is contingent on the Meridian deal and you can't commit right now, we can discuss again when the deal closes.

— Amanda

messages.subject: Re: TalentBridge — placement fee confirmation
messages.body:
Amanda,

I understand. The CSM role is genuinely contingent on Meridian — I can't commit to it in writing today.

Can we do 17% for the Sr. Frontend placement now, and revisit the full rate agreement once we have more clarity on the CSM timeline (end of Q1 at the latest)? I want to move forward with the candidate pipeline — I just want to make sure we're aligned on the rate before Anya Chen's final round.

— Nina
messages.internal_note: EDGE CASE: Thread ends without final written agreement on rate. 17% vs 16% is unresolved. The fee for Anya Chen placement is unclear.
